zh.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Neville於大約1235年出生在英國越可爾皮可爾時，她的父親Jollan de Neville49歲，母親Maud Beauchamp42歲。她於1253年與Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國越可爾吉賽利享年66歲。

zh-hans.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Neville于大约1235年出生在英国越可爾皮可爾时，她的父亲Jollan de Neville49岁，母亲Maud Beauchamp42岁。她于1253年与Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在英国越可爾吉賽利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Neville was born about 1235, in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, Jollan de Neville, was 49 and her mother, Maud Beauchamp, was 42. She married Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley in 1253. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1300, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Neville est née environ 1235, à Pickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Jollan de Neville, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Maud Beauchamp, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley en 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Neville um 1235 in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jollan de Neville 49 und ihre Mutter Maud Beauchamp 42. Sie hat 1253 Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville è nata il circa 1235 nel Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Jollan de Neville, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Maud Beauchamp, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley nel 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1300, nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Nevilleが約1235年にイギリスヨークシュアイアピックヒルで生まれた時，父Jollan de Nevilleは49歳，母Maud Beauchampは42歳であった。1253年にSir William De la Warde of Guiseleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Neville(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 요르크실르 피크힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jollan de Neville(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Beauchamp(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1253년 Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 요르크실르 길즈리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jollan de Neville, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Maud Beauchamp, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley em 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Neville родилась около 1235 г. в местности пиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Jollan de Neville было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Beauchamp, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley в 1253 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Neville nació aproximadamente 1235, en Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Jollan de Neville, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Maud Beauchamp, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Sir William De la Warde of Guiseley en 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1300, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
